description: Real perceptual hashing with sharp+imghash integration, cross-app bloom filter, and enhanced text classifier with toxic-bert scoring. Replace the naive DCT simulation in PerceptualHasher with real pHash via sharp (resize to 8x8 grayscale then DCT). Add a BloomFilter class for cross-app known-bad hash lookup. Enhance TextClassifier to output expanded category scores (toxicity, hate, harassment, sexual-minor, violence-explicit, self-harm, spam) matching the Phase 20 requirement.
steps: 1. Add sharp and imghash as dependencies to packages/moderation/package.json (sharp for image processing, imghash for pHash computation)

2. Rewrite packages/moderation/src/services/perceptual-hash.ts: (a) keep the existing PerceptualHasher class API (computeImageHash, compareImageHashes, isNearDuplicate, computeSimHash) but replace internals with real sharp-based implementation. computeImageHash uses sharp to resize to 32x32 grayscale, compute mean, generate binary hash. (b) Add async version computeImageHashAsync for the sharp pipeline. (c) Keep synchronous fallback using existing DCT for environments without sharp.

3. Create packages/moderation/src/services/bloom-filter.ts: implement a BloomFilter class with configurable size and hash count, add/has/estimateFalsePositiveRate methods, serialization (toBuffer/fromBuffer) for cross-app sharing via Redis or shared storage

4. Create packages/moderation/src/services/hash-registry.ts: HashRegistry class that combines PerceptualHasher + BloomFilter. Methods: registerHash(buffer) -> stores hash in bloom filter, checkHash(buffer) -> returns {found, distance} by checking bloom filter first then exact match, getStats() for monitoring

5. Expand TextModerationResponse in packages/moderation/src/types.ts to add: sexualMinors (child safety), threatOfViolence, spam categories. Update TextClassifier to map these new categories. Add ModerationScoreCard type with all 7 required scores: toxicity, hate, harassment, sexualMinor, violenceExplicit, selfHarm, spam

6. Update packages/moderation/src/services/text-classifier.ts: add mapToScoreCard() method that returns the full ModerationScoreCard from the raw API response. Add fallback scoring logic when API response doesn't include all categories.

7. Create packages/moderation/src/services/perceptual-hash.test.ts: test that computeImageHash produces consistent hashes for same input, different hashes for different input, isNearDuplicate works correctly with threshold
8. Create packages/moderation/src/services/bloom-filter.test.ts: test add/has, false positive rate estimation, serialization roundtrip
9. Update packages/moderation/src/index.ts to export BloomFilter, HashRegistry, ModerationScoreCard
acceptance_criteria: PerceptualHasher.computeImageHash produces deterministic 16-char hex hash for same Buffer input
BloomFilter correctly identifies added hashes with zero false negatives
BloomFilter false positive rate is within expected bounds (tested with 1000 items in 10000-bit filter)
TextClassifier.classify returns all 7 category scores in ModerationScoreCard format
HashRegistry combines bloom filter pre-check with exact perceptual hash match
All existing perceptual-hash tests still pass (API backward compatible)
pnpm turbo typecheck test build --filter=@quant/moderation passes
